pattern: My name is ___. I graduated from ___.
slots: Cheng, Beijing University / a master's program
example: My name is Cheng. I graduated from Beijing University.

slots: Computer Science, Marketing, Finance, Business Administration
example: I majored in Computer Science.

slots: marketing, junior developer, sales, project coordinator
example: I'm applying for the marketing position.

pattern: I have ___ years of experience in ___.
slots: two / marketing, one / customer service
example: I have two years of experience in marketing.

slots: project management, data analysis, customer service
example: I have experience in project management.

slots: 描述前一份工作的职责
example: managed a team, handled client accounts, coordinated events
difficulty: In my previous role, I managed a team of five.

slots: social media, client communication, data entry
example: I was responsible for social media management.

pattern: I worked on ___ during my internship.
slots: several projects, a marketing campaign, the website redesign
example: I worked on several projects during my internship.

slots: increasing sales by 20%, reducing costs, launching a new feature
example: One of my achievements was increasing sales by 20%.

slots: attention to detail, teamwork, problem-solving, adaptability
example: One of my strengths is attention to detail.

slots: communicating, organizing, working under pressure
example: I'm good at communicating with different teams.

slots: my time management, my public speaking, my technical skills
example: I'm working on improving my time management.

pattern: I believe my ___ could be stronger.
slots: presentation skills, coding skills, leadership experience
example: I believe my presentation skills could be stronger.

slots: this role / it aligns with my goals, the company culture / I value collaboration
example: I'm particularly interested in this role because it aligns with my career goals.

pattern: Could you tell me more about ___?
slots: the team, the day-to-day responsibilities, the company culture
example: Could you tell me more about the day-to-day responsibilities?

slots: the design team / a rebranding project, the engineering team / a new feature
example: I collaborated with the design team on a rebranding project.

pattern: I learned how to ___ during that experience.
slots: manage my time, communicate effectively, work under pressure
example: I learned how to manage my time during that experience.

slots: organized / meet deadlines, adaptable / handle change, patient / work with clients
example: I'm quite organized, which helps me meet deadlines.

slots: taking a course, practicing daily, asking for feedback
example: To improve, I've started taking an online course on public speaking.

pattern: I'm looking for a position where I can ___.
slots: grow professionally, apply my skills, make an impact
example: I'm looking for a position where I can grow professionally.

pattern: Thank you for ___. I look forward to ___.
slots: this opportunity / hearing from you, your time / the next steps
example: Thank you for your time. I look forward to hearing from you.
